content:
Testing Portfolio Manager Settings Dialog Scroll

This article describes how to verify the fix for a bug where the Portfolio Manager Settings dialog was not scrollable, preventing users from accessing all its content.

Source Tickets

  • BUIL-14651 — Scroll is missing in Portfolio Manager Settings dialog

Why This Matters

Users must be able to view and interact with all settings within the Portfolio Manager Settings dialog. A missing scrollbar prevents access to hidden content, leading to an incomplete user experience and potential inability to configure the portfolio manager correctly.

Preconditions

  • Access to a QA environment (e.g., qa.buildee.com).
  • A test account with permissions to access Organization → Building and the Portfolio Manager.

How to Test

  1. Navigate to the "Organization" section and select "Building".
  2. Open the "Overview" tab for a building.
  3. Locate and click on the "Portfolio Manager" section.
  4. Click on the "Settings" button within the Portfolio Manager.
  5. Observe the dialog that appears and attempt to scroll its content, especially if the content appears to extend beyond the visible area.

Expected Behavior

  • The Portfolio Manager Settings dialog should display a scrollbar when its content exceeds the visible height of the dialog.
  • The user should be able to smoothly scroll within the dialog to view all content.

Edge Cases & Negative Scenarios

  • Verify that the scrollbar appears correctly across different browser window sizes and zoom levels.
  • Confirm that the scrollbar does not appear if all content fits within the dialog's visible area.

Open Questions

  • Are there specific configurations or data that reliably cause the dialog content to overflow, ensuring the scrollbar is always tested under intended conditions?
  • What specific user role(s) are required to access the Portfolio Manager Settings?
